# Local official-source cache (ignored)

Populate this directory with `python -m collabproof.governance fetch`. Files other than this
README and `.gitignore` are intentionally ignored. They may contain official source material whose
redistribution permission has not been confirmed. Never substitute the confidential Pramaana PDF.

The fetch command prints each downloaded SHA-256. Promote a digest into `manifest.yaml` only after
confirming the retrieved bytes and source identity; do not invent one.
